title: Heartfelt goodbye to Grade 7s at Holy Cross
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - Holy Cross Primary...
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - Holy Cross Primary School's Grade 7 learners attended their final assembly this morning, 11 December.


> During the ceremony, each learner lit a candle - symbolising hope and the journey ahead – as they walked out of the hall while the school sang its new anthem.


It was a heartfelt farewell to their primary school years.

VIDEO: The Grade 7's say farewell

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
